overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements, crosses intersections with yellow markings, and passes under overpasses in a dense urban environment with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

futuristic red sports car with sleek design parked on the street

broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet downtown sidewalk at night, with a large pink digital billboard dominating the right side of the frame. A red sports car is parked on the left as the camera walks forward, approaching a wide intersection with bold yellow crosswalk stripes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection with distinctive yellow crosswalk markings, passing beneath a massive concrete overpass that creates a sheltered zone. A tall building with striking gold neon lighting stands on the right as futuristic cars pass through the intersection.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts. The COLA store with its bright white signage appears on the right, followed by a Real Water advertisement kiosk. Overhead, multiple floating digital billboards display various advertisements spanning the street.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches another intersection, stopping at the crosswalk before the pedestrian signal turns green. The camera then crosses the street, passing yellow striped crosswalk markings with red WAIT X text, while a red sports car drives past on the left and buildings with purple neon lighting line the right side.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along the sidewalk past a row of neon-lit storefronts. A large digital billboard with Japanese text is visible on the right as the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights, with the urban corridor extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked futuristic downtown, moving from a neon-dominated sidewalk through a series of wide urban intersections. It begins on a wet pavement beside a parked red sports car and a towering pink digital billboard, moving forward toward a wide intersection marked by bold yellow stripes. As the camera crosses the street, it passes beneath a massive concrete overpass and beside a building glowing with gold neon before transitioning onto a commercial sidewalk lined with a bright white COLA store and floating digital advertisements. The scene then shifts toward another crossing, pausing briefly at a pedestrian signal before moving past red WAIT X markings and purple neon buildings as another red sports car drives by. Finally, the camera continues along the sidewalk past a large Japanese digital billboard, where the wet ground reflects the vibrant lights of the extending urban corridor.
